name: Bitter Reunion
oracle_text:
When Bitter Reunion enters the battlefield, you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.
Sacrifice Bitter Reunion: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.
design_notes: A common enchantment that demonstrates two design patterns: (1) ETB triggered ability with optional discard for card advantage (red's 'rummage' mechanic — discard then draw), (2) sacrifice ability provides a secondary mode. Red gets card filtering (not pure draw) and haste-granting. The enchantment stays on battlefield after ETB, serving as a stored haste effect. Shows how even commons can have two distinct abilities when each is simple on its own.
